# IB Gram

> IB Gram is an independent tutoring platform for IB (International Baccalaureate) and IGCSE families in India. It matches parents with verified subject tutors for PYP, MYP, Diploma Programme, Career-related Programme, Cambridge IGCSE and Pearson Edexcel International GCSE, across home, online and hybrid lessons, matched by subject, level, city and schedule.

Families share a brief — city, curriculum, subjects, current concerns, preferred lesson mode — and the advisor team replies with a small shortlist of verified tutors. There are no chatbots, no long contracts and no score guarantees. Engagements are reviewed every few weeks and can be paused or stopped without penalty. IB Gram is not affiliated with the IB Organization, Cambridge International or Pearson Edexcel. Tutors teach, explain and review work; they do not write Internal Assessments, Extended Essays or any assessed coursework for students. Registered in Gurugram, Haryana, India. Founder: Ajay Vatsyayan. Contact: ibgram24@gmail.com, +91 7439 368 115. Gurugram is the canonical city name; Gurgaon is the natural alias for the same tutor pool.

## Courses

- [IB Mathematics](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/ib/mathematics/): Maths AA and AI at HL and SL, Internal Assessment support, calculator/GDC strategy and past-paper practice.
- [IB Sciences](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/ib/sciences/): Physics, Chemistry and Biology at HL and SL, IA design and mark-scheme literacy.
- [IB Individuals & Societies](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/ib/individuals/): Economics, Business Management, History, Psychology, Global Politics and Geography at HL and SL.
- [IB English](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/ib/english/): English A Language and Literature, English A Literature and English B, with Individual Oral and HL essay coaching.
- [IB Language Acquisition](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/ib/language/): Language B and ab initio (Spanish, French, Mandarin, Hindi, German).
- [IGCSE Mathematics](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/igcse/mathematics/): Cambridge 0580 (Core/Extended), 0606 Additional Maths and Pearson Edexcel 4MA1.
- [IGCSE Sciences](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/igcse/sciences/): Cambridge 0625/0620/0610 and Edexcel 4PH1/4CH1/4BI1 Physics, Chemistry and Biology.
- [IGCSE Humanities](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/igcse/individuals/): Economics, Business, History and Geography (Cambridge and Edexcel).
- [IGCSE English](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/igcse/english/): Cambridge First Language English and Literature, Edexcel English Language and Literature.
- [IGCSE Languages](https://www.ibgram.com/courses/igcse/language/): Cambridge foreign languages, Hindi as a Second Language and English as a Second Language.

## Programmes

- [IB Programmes hub](https://www.ibgram.com/programmes/): Overview of all four IB programmes.
- [Primary Years Programme (PYP)](https://www.ibgram.com/programmes/pyp/): Inquiry, reading, numeracy and confidence for ages 3–12.
- [Middle Years Programme (MYP)](https://www.ibgram.com/programmes/myp/): Criteria, projects and assignment structure for ages 11–16.
- [Diploma Programme (DP)](https://www.ibgram.com/programmes/dp/): HL/SL subjects, IA, EE, TOK and exam revision for ages 16–19.
- [Career-related Programme (CP)](https://www.ibgram.com/programmes/cp/): Career-focused IB pathway for ages 16–19.

## IB tutor city pages

- [Gurugram IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/gurugram/): Golf Course Road, DLF Phases 1–5, Sushant Lok and Sectors 43, 50, 56.
- [Delhi IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/delhi/): Vasant Vihar, Vasant Kunj, Saket, Greater Kailash and Defence Colony.
- [Noida IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/noida/): Sectors 44, 50, 62, 93 and Noida Expressway.
- [Mumbai IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/mumbai/): Bandra, Khar, Juhu, BKC and South Mumbai.
- [Bangalore IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/bangalore/): Indiranagar, Koramangala, HSR Layout, Whitefield and Sarjapur.
- [Pune IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/pune/): IB tutor matching across Pune.
- [Hyderabad IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/hyderabad/): IB tutor matching across Hyderabad.
- [Chennai IB tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/chennai/): IB tutor matching across Chennai.
- [IB tutor hub](https://www.ibgram.com/ib-tutors/): All IB tutor city pages.

- [Bangalore IGCSE tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/igcse-pages/bangalore/): IGCSE matching across Bangalore.
- [Pune IGCSE tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/igcse-pages/pune/): IGCSE matching across Pune.
- [Hyderabad IGCSE tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/igcse-pages/hyderabad/): IGCSE matching across Hyderabad.
- [Chennai IGCSE tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/igcse-pages/chennai/): IGCSE matching across Chennai.
- [IGCSE hub](https://www.ibgram.com/igcse-pages/): All IGCSE tutor city pages.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://www.ibgram.com/): IB and IGCSE tutor matching for home, online and hybrid learning.
- [IGCSE guide](https://www.ibgram.com/igcse/): Cambridge and Edexcel IGCSE support and FAQs.
- [All tutors](https://www.ibgram.com/tutors/): Browse the verified tutor directory.
- [About IB Gram](https://www.ibgram.com/about-us/): How the independent matching model works.
- [Contact / book a tutor](https://www.ibgram.com/contact-us/): Share a brief and request a tutor shortlist.
- [Admissions support](https://www.ibgram.com/admissions/): School and university admissions guidance.
- [Blog](https://www.ibgram.com/blog/): Articles on IB and IGCSE study, exams and parenting.

## Optional

- [Full AI context](https://www.ibgram.com/llms-full.txt): Extended llms-full.txt with key facts, keyword clusters and academic-integrity notes.
- [Sitemap](https://www.ibgram.com/sitemap.xml): All indexable URLs on the site.
